title: FCA warns of major shakeup as AI agents meet tokenized money
message_html: FCA warns of major shakeup as AI agents meet tokenized money ...
snippet: The FCA’s vision for agentic AI points toward a financial system where programmable money and tokenized assets could play a much larger role.

title: UN agency moves Stellar blockchain payment initiative beyond pilot stage
message_html: UN agency moves Stellar blockchain payment initiative beyond pilot stage ...
snippet: The UN Development Programme said blockchain payment pilots in five countries cut costs, improved resilience and will now inform wider use across its humanitarian and development programs.
